settings.text:
“What a man hears, he may doubt; what he sees he may also doubt; but what he does, he cannot doubt.” – Seaman A. Knapp

Every new seed variety looks great in the company advertising, and it may have a lot of potential, but will it really do well on your farm? If you’re a commercial grower interested in testing new cultivars, get in touch with us and we’ll gladly supply seeds samples for your on-farm trials. Visit our assortment of varieties under development.

settings.custom_liquid: Field vegetable production accounts for its part for $1.3 billion in sales and in every province and territory in Canada, growers are constantly improving their practices using new technology and techniques to ensure optimal efficiency and quality. Overall Canada’s total marketed vegetable production volume reached about 2.8 million metric tonnes of produce. Although the seasonal nature of field vegetable production in Canada leads the country to be a net importer of fresh vegetables to fulfill Canadian demand year-round, horticultural export continues to increase yearly in part thanks to the innovative cutting-edge technologies that allow Canadian greenhouse cultivation to increase production quality and yield of various crops and to respond throughout the year to the demands of more seasoned domestic and international consumers.Canadian horticulture is a vibrant, dynamic, and diverse industry and is in a constant state of development. It continually introduces innovative varieties to meet the changing consumer preferences and requirements especially in terms of organic, environmentally friendly, and tasty products. Stemming from that inspiring energy, Hortinova was established with a mission to contribute to the development of that flourishing industry. Hortinova strives to introduce to the Canadian market novel vegetable varieties from international breeding and seed producing companies and supply farmers with high-quality varieties selected not only for their productivity and disease resistance but to meet the needs of the distribution chain and above all consumer taste satisfaction. We believe, as the saying goes, that to plant a seed is to believe in tomorrow. We trust that you will find in us your reliable partner in seed and that, together, we can farm for the future.​

settings.text:
Some of our seeds are currently available for direct online purchasing, in various sized commercial packets, via our e-commerce platform. Please visit our online shop.

Nonetheless, do not hesitate to browse our online catalogues and contact us at contact@hortinova.ca to inform us of any requirement you may have and place your special orders. We’ll get back to you with varieties recommendations, availability, pricing and logistics.

Commercial seed companies, packet companies, retail stores and garden center businesses who wish to become Hortinova Retail Partners may order our commercial packets at wholesale price or place bulk seed special orders of select hybrid and open pollinated vegetable varieties as well as a wide selection of herbs and flowers seeds.

For further information and to discuss your requirements please do not hesitate to contact us at contact@hortinova.ca. We’ll get back to you with varieties recommendations, availability, pricing and logistics.
